name: bigmark
description: Insert ASCII section-banner comments (minimap landmarks) using the bigmark CLI.

bigmark.binaryPath.description: Path to the bigmark executable. Use a bare name to resolve on PATH, or an absolute path.

enumDescriptions: Rotated 90deg: the word runs down the file.
Canvas: the word carved/filled into a block field for the minimap.
bigmark.mode.description: Which bigmark render mode to use.

bigmark.width.description: Max line width passed to bigmark (-w).

bigmark.commentPrefix.description: Comment prefix for non-canvas modes (-c). Leave empty to auto-derive from the active file's language. Include a trailing space, e.g. "// ".

bigmark.figletPath.description: Path to the figlet binary. Passed to bigmark as BIGMARK_FIGLET. Leave empty to let bigmark find figlet on PATH / common locations.
